bootstrap.unit: item cluster retaining ten policy cells

frozen_paraphrases.S1: Response formality should match what was requested
frozen_paraphrases.S2: Response length/conciseness should match what was requested
frozen_paraphrases.S3: Response organization should match the requested structure
frozen_paraphrases.T1: The requested task/instruction should actually be completed
frozen_paraphrases.T2: Task content should be factually correct

verdict_rule: PASS iff all three perturbations pass; PARTIAL iff repeat passes and another fails; FAIL iff repeat fails the locked point+CI rule
